title: The Children of Elbaf Panic
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Jarul, Children, Unknown person #6, Usopp as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Western Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: what i find most scary DRAUGR

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: sober up and grab your weapons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That fire-swair was wrecked!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's not just a regular zombie?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It a drawer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What could've brought the children's imagination to life like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where are the Chiefs?! We're waiting on their orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They drank too much... they're still holed up in the privy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're Kidding!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THIS COULDN'T BE MORE SURREAL!! A GIANT ME?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You visitors should fall back to the edge of the village!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, you don't need to keep us at arm's length!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We want to help fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Should I carry you all there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said that last bit a little too quietly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Either way, there's definitely something strange happening on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's enough, colon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why not?! I'm a warrior too! I can fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I JUST TOLD YOU < NO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm Gyaban's son!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And that doesn't make you GYaban!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A battlefield's no place for a kid like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AYAH!

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: JARUL!!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: What's wrong, missy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm sorry, there's something...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...I didn't tell you before!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're saying one of these intruders looked just like Red Hair?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah!! And both of them were seriously strong.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of them had a really weird ability...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In this world, strange powers usually come from Devil fruits.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it's an unknown element, odds are it's a devil fruit user.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: spread the word that there are two humans other than the straw hats on Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Report back as soon as you find them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Got it!! Right away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are you sure it's only two intruders?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All this chaos suggests there could be more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get the word out, now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I don't know who's behind this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or where they're hiding, but anyone who kidneys children in broad daylight is nothing but scum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If they're taking hostages,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They must've something else planned for Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never heard of a kidnapping like this before!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let them get away with it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll lend you a hand! We'll just need a human sized ship to--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't be ridiculous! You're our guests!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You should go hide somewhere safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Where are Dorry and Brogy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, just wait a sec!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Still stuck in the privy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THEY SERIOUSLY NEED TO LAY OFF THE BOOZE!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 54 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
